banner.suspendedMessage: Read-only mode — Your subscription is suspended.

expire.graceMessage: Your subscription has expired, you have <days>{daysRemaining}</days> day{plural} left to renew before your account is suspended.
expire.suspendedMessage: Your account is in read-only mode. You can view your data, but you can no longer create or modify records. Renew your subscription to restore full access.
expire.expiredMessage: Your account is suspended. Access to the application is no longer available until your subscription is renewed.
expire.inactiveMessage: Your subscription is no longer active. Choose a plan to continue using FarmFlow.
expire.helpMessage: Contact our support at <email>support@farmflow.cm</email> or call <phone>+237 600 000 000</phone>.
